sections.paragraph:
γλεῦκος, ους, τό (Aristot. et al.; Plut.; Lucian, Philops. 39; Galen XII p. 88, 6 K., XIII p. 45, 18 al.; Athen. 1, 31e; GDI 4993; PPetr II, 40[b], 8 [277 b.c.]; PSI 544, 2; PGrenf II, 24, 12 al.; s. Preis.; Job 32:19; Jos., Ant. 2, 64) sweet new wine (schol. on Nicander, Alexiph. 493 γλεῦκος, ὸ̔ λέγεται ἐν συνηθείᾳ μοῦστος= ‘γλεῦκος, commonly referred to as must’; cp. PStras 1, 7 [V a.d.]) Ac 2:13.—DELG s.v. γλυκύς. M-M.

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Galen Galen , II a.d.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

Athen Athen , III a.d.—List 5

GDI GDI = Sammlung der griechischen Dialekt-Inschriften—List 3

PPetr PPetr = The Flinders Petrie Papyri—List 4

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

PGrenf II PGrenf II = BGrenfell/AHunt, New Classical Fragments—Lists 4

Preis. Preis. = FPreisigke, Wörterbuch der griech. Papyrusurkunden—Lists 4, 6

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

schol. schol. = scholion, scholia, scholiast

Nicander Nicander , III/II b.c.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

PStras PStras = Griechische Papyrus der kaiserlichen Universitäts- und Landesbibliothek zu Strassburg—List 4

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 201
